title: Spirit of God, Dwell Now Within my Heart

verses.text: Spirit of God, dwell thou within my heart; wean it from earth, through all its pulses move; stoop to my weakness, mighty as thou art, and make me love thee as I ought to love. Trinity Psalter Hymnal. 2018, used by permssion
I ask no dream, no prophet ecstasies, no sudden rending of the veil of clay, no angel visitant, no op'ning skies; but take the dimness of my soul away. Trinity Psalter Hymnal. 2018, used by permssion

Hast thou not bid us love thee, God and King? All, all thine own, soul, heart, and strength and mind. I see thy cross--there teach my heart to cling: O let me seek thee, and O let me find. Trinity Psalter Hymnal. 2018, used by permssion

Teach me to feel that thou art always nigh; teach me the struggles of the soul to bear, to check the rising doubt, the rebel sigh; teach me the patience of unanswered prayer. Trinity Psalter Hymnal. 2018, used by permssion

Teach me to love thee as thine angels love, one holy passion filling all my frame; the baptism of the heav'n-descended Dove, my heart an altar, and thy love the flame. Trinity Psalter Hymnal. 2018, used by permission
